news.headline: Valoe's AGM results and board organization announced. Follow-up meeting planned. Key decisions made.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global smartphone sales have experienced a notable decline of approximately 20% during the last quarter, with only 295 million units sold. In contrast, the tablet market experienced a slight growth of 5%, with 47 million units sold. This shift in consumer behavior has raised concerns among industry analysts about the future of the smartphone market. The decline in smartphone sales is primarily attributed to the economic impact of the ongoing pandemic, as consumers are cutting back on non-essential purchases. Additionally, the rise in remote work and virtual learning has contributed to the increased demand for tablets as more people are seeking devices for productivity and entertainment. This trend is expected to continue in the coming months, with experts predicting a further decline in smartphone sales and a steady growth in the tablet market.

news.headline: ENF announces revamped EOS staking rewards with Yves La Rose heading the changes. For more details, visit: (link)
news.summary: Yves La Rose, leading the EOS Network Foundation (ENF), has announced significant alterations to EOS staking rewards. For detailed information, please visit our website.

news.headline: Endo, Inc. (OTCQX: NDOI) begins trading on OTCQX with ticker symbol NDOI, highlighting commitment to long-term success.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Endo, Inc. (OTCQX: NDOI), based in Malvern, Pennsylvania, revealed its initiation of trading on the OTCQX Best Market under the ticker symbol NDOI. This move signifies the company's dedication to its operations on the market.

news.headline: 70th anniversary of Five Principles of Peaceful Coexistence celebrated, promoting international relations, recognized worldwide.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, in Beijing, a report highlighted the 70th anniversary of the Five Principles of Peaceful Coexistence. These principles have gained global acceptance and recognition over the past seventy years. Various countries have embraced them, reflecting their importance and impact on international relations.

news.headline: Adnoc emerges as top dealmaker with $150B investment, Bloomberg reports.
Sierra Metals starts trading on Lima Stock Exchange (BVL) with symbol BVL:SMT on June 28, 2024, aims to boost investor exposure and liquidity. CEO Ernesto Balarezo welcomes the move.
news.summary: Sierra Metals Inc. (TSX:SMT | OTCQX:SMTSF | BVL:SMT) has disclosed that starting June 28, 2024, its common shares will be traded on the Bolsa de Valores de Lima under the symbol BVL:SMT. The move aims to enhance investor exposure and liquidity possibilities. Mr. Ernesto Balarezo, CEO of Sierra Metals, expressed satisfaction with this development. This strategic decision opens up new avenues for growth and engagement in the market.

news.headline: Emera reallocates capital for long-term growth, aiming for 5-7% EPS growth through 2027 (TSX:EMA), rate-base growth of 7-8% through 2029.
news.summary: Halifax, Nova Scotia-based Emera Inc. (TSX:EMA) revealed a strategic update aimed at creating lasting value for shareholders and expanding growth prospects. The company is targeting an average EPS growth of 5-7% over the next three years until 2027, as well as extending its rate-base growth projection from 7-8% for the next five years until 2029. This initiative is envisioned to drive substantial growth opportunities within Emera's portfolio, securing a prosperous future for the company and its investors.

news.headline: One Energy hosting Virtual Analyst & Investor Day on July 1, 2024, from 1:00 p.m. to 2:30 p.m. ET. Registration required at provided link. Live streamed from Findlay, Ohio.
news.summary: A company specializing in industrial power, One Energy Enterprises Inc., is set to hold a Virtual Analyst and Investor Day on July 1, 2024, from 1:00 p.m. to 2:30 p.m. ET. Interested individuals must register at https://icr.swoogo.com/One_Power to participate. The event, which will originate from Findlay, Ohio, can be viewed live. During the session, an investor presentation will be shared, and a copy of this presentation will be accessible to attendees.

news.headline: Riyadh Air and Saudi Arabian designer Ashi present new collection at Haute Couture Week in Paris on June 28, 2024.
news.summary: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia on June 28, 2024, Riyadh Air, the country's premier airline owned by the Public Investment Fund (PIF), revealed a partnership with renowned Saudi fashion designer Ashi of ASHI Studio. The collaboration marks the airline's inaugural venture into the fashion industry.

news.headline: 80 deaths now related to Japanese supplement for lowering cholesterol, raising concerns about self-reporting of product claims.
news.summary: A recent case has brought to light the issue of companies self-reporting claims about their products. The case involves a supplement designed to lower cholesterol levels. This has raised concerns about the regulation of such claims and the impact on public health. The supplement in question claimed to reduce cholesterol by 20% in just one month, prompting scrutiny over the validity and accuracy of such statements. This highlights the need for stricter oversight and transparency in the industry to ensure consumer safety and prevent misleading information.

news.headline: Global Medical REIT Inc. (NYSE: GMRE) releases Corporate Social Responsibility Report focusing on ESG topics in healthcare.
news.summary: Headquartered in Bethesda, Maryland, Global Medical REIT Inc. (NYSE: GMRE) is a net-lease medical real estate investment trust. The company, known as GMRE, focuses on acquiring healthcare facilities and leasing them to various healthcare entities. GMRE recently released its Corporate Social Responsibility Report, outlining its strategies regarding environmental, social, and governance (ESG) issues. Jeffrey M. Busch, the Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, emphasized the significance of this report.

news.headline: CHMP recommends EU approval of Roche's PiaSky for PNH, a rare blood condition; intended for adults/adolescents; potential monthly SC treatment may reduce infusion burden.
news.summary: Today, Roche announced that the CHMP of the EMA has issued a positive opinion for PiaSky (crovalimab) in treating PNH. PiaSky is a novel monoclonal antibody targeting complement protein C5, recommended for adults and adolescents (12 years or older, weighing 40 kg) new to or previously treated with C5 inhibitors. If approved, it will be the EU's first monthly SC PNH treatment, allowing self-administration post-training. This may offer a less burdensome alternative to current IV infusion C5 inhibitors, potentially reducing treatment disruption. The final decision from the European Commission is imminent.

news.headline: ICE announces update on cessation of U.S. dollar LIBOR. FCA compels IBA to continue publishing until June 2023.
news.summary: Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE:ICE), a prominent global technology and data provider, has reported that ICE Benchmark Administration Limited (IBA), the overseer of LIBOR®, has issued an update on the discontinuation of U.S. dollar LIBOR®. The U.K. Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) has chosen to utilize its authority under the U.K. Benchmarks Regulation (U.K. BMR) to mandate IBA to sustain publishing LIBOR® rates. This decision aligns with prior communications on the matter.

news.headline: Marqeta, Inc. will host a call on August 7, 2024, to discuss Q2 2024 results at 4:30 pm ET with CEO and CFO.
news.summary: Marqeta, Inc. (NASDAQ: MQ), a leading modern card issuing platform based in Oakland, California, is set to hold a conference call and webcast on August 7, 2024, at 4:30 pm ET to discuss their financial performance for the second quarter of that year. The call, hosted by CEO Simon Khalaf and CFO Mike Milotich, will be followed by the release of a press statement detailing the Q2 2024 financial results after the market closes on the same day. This announcement comes as part of the company's regular reporting and investor communication practices.

news.headline: Burford Capital reports share-based compensation transactions linked to LTIP on June 28, 2024.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, in New York, Burford Capital Limited ("Burford"), a prominent global finance and asset management company specializing in law, disclosed multiple transactions related to the Burford Capital 2016 Long Term Incentive Plan (LTIP)....

news.headline: IsoEnergy settles portion of interest payment to QRC in shares. Company to pay 600,000 common shares to QRC.
news.summary: In Saskatoon, SK and Toronto, on June 28, 2024, IsoEnergy Ltd. (TSXV: ISO) (OTCQX: ISENF) has reached an agreement to resolve a part of the interest payments owed to Queen's Road Capital Investment Ltd. (TSXV: QRC) as of June 30, 2024, by issuing common shares instead.

news.headline: Main Street's corporate credit facility increased to $1.110 billion with final maturity extended to June 2029.
news.summary: Main Street Capital Corporation (NYSE: MAIN) has announced an increase in total commitments to $1.110 billion and an extension of the final maturity of its revolving credit facility to June 2029. This amendment marks a significant development for the company, allowing for increased financial flexibility and liquidity. The extension of the facility's maturity provides Main Street Capital Corporation with a longer runway for utilizing the funds and managing its capital structure effectively. Overall, this adjustment underscores Main Street's commitment to strengthening its financial position and operational capabilities in the market.

news.headline: DEEPX, an AI chip company, becomes first to be invited to World Economic Forum. Led by CEO Lokwon Kim.
news.summary: In a groundbreaking achievement, DEEPX, an AI semiconductor technology company based in DALIAN, China and led by CEO Lokwon Kim, has become the first of its kind to receive an invitation to the prestigious World Economic Forum. The event, scheduled for June 28, 2024, marks a significant milestone for the company and recognizes its innovative contributions to the field. DEEPX's recognition on a global platform underscores its leading position in the industry.

news.headline: 2024: US crude oil forecasted at $79.72/bbl, up from $79.56 predicted in May - Survey.
Introducing the Yard Force 38-Inch 75Ah Battery Riding Lawn Mower at Peavey Mart Canada, revolutionizing lawn care with power and eco-friendliness.
news.summary: Yard Force, a well-known outdoor power equipment brand, has released the Yard Force 38-Inch 75Ah Battery Riding Lawn Mower at Peavey Mart Canada in Toronto. This advanced mower provides Canadian homeowners with a powerful and environmentally friendly option for lawn maintenance. The innovative features of this mower aim to revolutionize the lawn care routine of users, offering efficiency and convenience. The 38-Inch 75Ah Battery Riding Lawn Mower is designed to deliver exceptional performance, ensuring a pristine lawn while prioritizing eco-conscious practices.

news.headline: Esperion sells European royalties on bempedoic acid for $304.7 million to OMERS, royalties revert once OMERS gets 1.7x investment.
news.summary: OMERS Life Sciences has made a deal to acquire Esperion's European royalty on bempedoic acid products for a total of $304.7 million. As part of the agreement, European royalties will go back to Esperion once OMERS has received an equivalent of 1.7 times its initial investment.

news.headline: Amwell to undergo 1-for-20 reverse stock split effective July 10, 2024 at 5:00 p.m. EDT, trading to begin on NYSE on July 11, 2024.
news.summary: Boston, June 28, 2024 - Today, the healthcare company Amwell® (NYSE: AMWL) disclosed a decision by its Board of Directors to approve a 1-for-20 reverse stock split of its Class A, Class B, and Class C common stock, effective on July 10, 2024, at 5:00 p.m. EDT. Following this, the Class A common stock is anticipated to commence trading on a split-adjusted basis on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) as of July 11, 2024. The ticker symbol for the Class A common stock, "AMWL," will remain unchanged post this reverse split move.

news.headline: Iovance Biotherapeutics files for approval in Europe for Lifileucel to treat advanced melanoma.
Golden Metal Resources PLC upgraded to OTCQX from OTCQB, joining 12,000 securities trade markets.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, OTC Markets Group Inc. disclosed that Golden Metal Resources PLC (LON: GMET; OTCQX: GMTLF), a company focusing on precious and strategic metals exploration, has met the requirements to trade on the OTCQX® Best Market. OTC Markets Group Inc. operates regulated markets for trading approximately 12,000 U.S. and international securities. The move represents an upgrade for Golden Metal Resources PLC from the OTCQB® Venture Market to the OTCQX, signifying a positive development in their trading status.

news.headline: Asset Entities Inc. plans 1-for-5 reverse stock split to meet Nasdaq bid price, offers digital services.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Asset Entities Inc. (NASDAQ: ASST), a company specializing in digital marketing and content delivery services on various social media platforms, including Discord, as well as a Ternary Payment Platform company, revealed a 1-for-5 reverse stock split of its class A common stock and class B common stock. Following this move, the company's common stock, which includes both class A and class B shares, underwent the split.

news.headline: Plug Power Inc. will receive federal clean hydrogen production tax credit at its Woodbine, Ga facility; one of the first in the US to utilize the Section 45V Credit for Production of Clean Hydrogen.
news.summary: In Latham, N.Y., on June 28, 2024, Plug Power Inc. (NASDAQ: PLUG), a leading global provider of hydrogen solutions for the green hydrogen market, has initiated commercial operations at its electrolytic hydrogen plant in Woodbine, Ga. The company plans to incorporate the benefits of the Inflation Reduction Act’s (IRA) Section 45V Credit for the Production of Clean Hydrogen (PTC) into its upcoming quarterly financial statements. Plug Power will be among the pioneering clean hydrogen producers in the U.S. leveraging this new incentive, which was introduced through a Congressional Act and signed into law by President Biden.

news.headline: Eliem Therapeutics (Nasdaq: ELYM) added to Russell 2000® and Russell 3000® Indexes, effective June 28, 2024.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Eliem Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: ELYM), revealed that they are set to join the Russell 2000® and Russell 3000® Indexes. This decision comes as part of the yearly reshuffling of the Russell stock indexes and is effective immediately. This move marks an important milestone for the company and signifies its growing presence in the market. Eliem Therapeutics, Inc. will now be a part of these two significant indexes, potentially increasing visibility and opportunities for investors.

news.headline: OTC Markets Group welcomes Endo, Inc. to OTCQX, company trades on Best Market, operator of markets for 12,000 securities.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, OTC Markets Group Inc. disclosed that Endo, Inc. (OTCQX: NDOI), a diversified specialty pharmaceutical company, has met the requirements to be listed on the OTCQX® Best Market. OTC Markets Group Inc. operates regulated markets for trading a total of 12,000 U.S. and international securities.

news.headline: 23andMe and Nightingale Health partner to pilot blood biomarker panel with their members. (Total characters: 78)
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, 23andMe Holding Co. (Nasdaq: ME) based in South San Francisco, California, partnered with Nightingale Health Plc to conduct a strategic collaboration. Nightingale Health, a leading company in biomarker testing and risk prediction, will pilot its cost-effective blood metabolomics panel with a group of 23andMe members. This collaboration aims to utilize Nightingale Health’s clinically-validated panel to provide valuable insights into the health of individuals within the cohort.

news.headline: Verve Therapeutics appoints Nia Tatsis, Ph.D., and Jodie Morrison to board of directors; Dr. Tatsis from Vertex, Ms. Morrison from Q32 Bio.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, in Boston, Verve Therapeutics revealed the addition of Nia Tatsis, Ph.D., and Jodie Morrison to its board of directors. Dr. Tatsis, from Vertex Pharmaceuticals, brings her expertise as the EVP and Chief Regulatory & Quality Officer. Meanwhile, Ms. Morrison, CEO and Director of Q32 Bio Inc., contributes her leadership. Verve Therapeutics focuses on innovative cardiovascular disease care through single-course gene editing medications.

news.headline: Odronextamab recommended for EU approval by CHMP to treat relapsed/refractory follicular lymphoma and diffuse large B-cell lymphoma based on strong Phase 1 and Phase 2 trial data.
news.summary: Analysis of findings from Phase 1 and key Phase 2 studies show strong and lasting response rates in relapsed/refractory follicular lymphoma and diffuse large B-cell lymphoma. The data from these trials support the recommendation for the treatment.

news.headline: 2024 average Brent crude oil price forecast at $83.93/bbl, slightly lower than previous $84.01 estimate - Survey
Warren Buffett donates 13,008,758 shares of Berkshire Hathaway "B" stock to five foundations; converts 8,674 A shares into 13,011,000 B shares for the donation.
news.summary: Today in Omaha, Nebraska, Warren E. Buffett will be converting 8,674 Class A shares into 13,011,000 Class B shares. This conversion is part of a generous donation plan, with 13,008,758 shares of Berkshire Hathaway "B" stock being distributed to various foundations. Specifically, 9,930,357 shares will go to the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation Trust, 993,035 to the Susan Thompson Buffett Foundation, and 695,122 shares each to the Sherwood Foundation, Howard G. Buffett Foundation, and NoVo Foundation. These donations are set to be completed today, showcasing Mr. Buffett's commitment to philanthropy.

news.headline: IASO Bio's GPRC5D CAR-T product RD118 receives IND approval from NMPA, a milestone for the biopharmaceutical company.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, IASO Biotechnology, a biopharmaceutical company based in Nanjing, China, Shanghai, and San Jose, California, shared the news through a PR statement. The company specializes in creating cutting-edge cell therapies and antibody products. Today, they revealed a significant development...

news.headline: Apellis plans to appeal after CHMP rejects pegcetacoplan for GA treatment in EU.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Apellis Pharmaceuticals, Inc. declared that the European Medicines Agency's Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use (CHMP) has issued a negative opinion on the marketing authorization application (MAA) for intravitreal pegcetacoplan, a drug aimed at treating geographic atrophy (GA). Apellis Pharmaceuticals, Inc., listed on Nasdaq as APLS, faced this setback in their application for approval in Europe.

news.headline: Crown Crafts reports Q4 and FY fiscal 2024 financial results.
news.summary: In a recent update, it was reported that the current unemployment rate in the nation has reached 6.7%, which marks a significant increase from the previous month. This rise in unemployment has led to over 1.4 million individuals losing their jobs in just the past month. Additionally, the stock market has experienced a downturn, with the main indices dropping by 2-3% in response to the economic instability. Experts are voicing concerns about the lasting impact of these trends on the overall economy and job market, highlighting the need for targeted interventions to address the challenges faced by businesses and workers during this time of uncertainty.

news.headline: Chinese President Xi Jinping quoted an old Chinese proverb during a keynote speech at the UN Office in Switzerland on Jan 18, 2017.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, in Beijing, Chinese President Xi Jinping referenced an old Chinese proverb during his keynote speech titled "Work Together to Build a Community of Shared Future for Humankind" at the United Nations Office in Geneva, Switzerland. This speech was delivered on January 18, 2017.

news.headline: Bitget Wallet and Foresight X invest in Tomarket, a new asset trading platform targeting trillion-dollar markets beyond DEXs.
news.summary: In Victoria, Seychelles, on June 28, 2024, Bitget Wallet, a prominent Web3 wallet and DeFi platform, revealed a collaborative investment with Foresight X, a crypto investment company. This investment is directed towards Tomarket, a decentralized trading platform for new asset categories. The platform was created by experienced professionals in the industry.

news.headline: HHC Vaping European Database 2024, covers 31 countries legality of HHC in vaping products. - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: ResearchAndMarkets.com has recently included the "HHC (Hexahydrocannabinol) European Database" in its offerings. This database focuses on identifying the legal status of HHC vaping products in major European markets. It not only assesses the legality of HHC as a substance but also its legality within vaping products. Users can filter the contents based on the probability of HHC legality. The database provides data for each country, along with hyperlinks for additional information.

news.headline: Huawei's Li Peng highlights maximizing value from experience with 5.5G at MWC Shanghai 2024. Keynote focuses on carriers' potential.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024 in Shanghai, Li Peng, Corporate Senior Vice President and President of ICT Sales & Service at Huawei, spoke at MWC Shanghai 2024 about optimizing the benefits of 5.5G for carriers. The keynote underscored the importance of industry-wide collaboration in this effort, reflecting significant progress in this area.

news.headline: NovaBay Pharmaceuticals promotes Avenova products with discounts for Dry Eye Awareness Month.
news.summary: NovaBay Pharmaceuticals, Inc. based in Emeryville, California, listed on NYSE American as NBY, has revealed plans to provide exclusive promotions and price reductions on its Avenova® eyecare items to consumers and eyecare specialists in July in honor of National Dry Eye Awareness Month. This initiative aims to highlight the significance of maintaining eye health for overall well-being and to raise public awareness regarding dry eye condition. The Sjögren's Foundation and collaborating entities initially proposed this endeavor.

news.headline: Lindsay Corporation raises quarterly cash dividend by 3% to $0.36 per share, payable on Aug 30, 2024.
news.summary: A company based in Omaha, Nebraska, Lindsay Corporation (NYSE: LNN), known for manufacturing and distributing irrigation and infrastructure equipment, recently shared news of a dividend declaration. The Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.36 per share. This dividend is set to be paid on August 30, 2024. Shareholders recorded as of August 16, 2024, will be eligible for this dividend. This new quarterly cash dividend marks a three percent increase from the prior rate of $0.35 per share.

news.headline: BCC Research shares 7 insights on IIoT market. Reveals key trends and growth drivers. Boston, June 28, 2024. (Character count: 99)
news.summary: In a recent report, BCC Research highlighted key trends, innovations, and industry changes in the Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT) market. The analysis, released on June 28, 2024, in Boston, pointed out crucial growth drivers and future prospects in this sector. The report emphasized the significant advancements in industrial environments, stressing the importance of staying abreast of developments in this rapidly evolving landscape.

news.headline: CKGSB highlighted its thought leadership at WEF in Dalian, China on June 25-27, 2024. Global leaders gathered for "Summer Davos Forum."
news.summary: The annual World Economic Forum Meeting of the New Champions, also known as the "Summer Davos Forum," took place in Dalian, China from June 25 to 27, 2024. The event drew global leaders across different industries to discuss pressing economic issues. Notable speakers included Dean, and others who shared insights on key topics.

news.headline: SuperMap AI Foundations showcased AI and geospatial intelligence at GISTC 2024 in Beijing on June 25, focusing on quality development.
news.summary: In Beijing on June 25, 2024, the 2024 Geospatial Intelligence Software Technology Conference (GISTC 2024) started at the China National Convention Center. The conference focuses on "Geospatial Intelligence, Driving Quality Development" and is scheduled for two days.

news.headline: OpenAI reveals CriticGPT to detect GPT-4 errors; assists trainers in identifying mistakes in ChatGPT during RLHF.
news.summary: OpenAI has unveiled CriticGPT, a new tool specifically developed for critiquing responses generated by ChatGPT. The primary purpose of CriticGPT is to assist human trainers in identifying errors more effectively during reinforcement learning and human feedback loops. This innovation aims to streamline the training process and improve the quality of responses produced by ChatGPT.

news.headline: DPC Dash Ltd, Domino's Pizza China's master franchisee, now operates 900 stores in Mainland China.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, in Hong Kong, DPC Dash Ltd - Domino's Pizza China, listed as 1405.HK, operates as Domino's Pizza's sole master franchisee in China Mainland, Hong Kong, and Macau.

news.headline: AB Science updates on application for conditional marketing approval of masitinib in ALS; important step in treatment with 30,000 new cases/year.
EURneffy, a needle-free adrenaline nasal spray, recommended for approval by CHMP in Europe for treating anaphylaxis, potentially being the first option.
news.summary: EURneffy has the potential to become the initial and sole needle-free adrenaline alternative sanctioned for addressing allergic reactions (anaphylaxis) in Europe.

news.headline: Well Intervention Market to grow from $9.2 billion in 2024 to $11.3 billion by 2029, CAGR of 4.2% - MarketsandMarkets™.
news.summary: As of June 28, 2024, the Well Intervention Market has been valued at approximately $9.2 billion. Analysts project that by 2029, this market is expected to increase to $11.3 billion, indicating a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.2% during this period. This information is derived from a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™. Well intervention services continue to play a significant role in the industry, with a positive outlook for future growth.
